# KCP — Knowledge Context Protocol
# https://github.com/kcp-protocol/kcp
#
# This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org/)
# It tells AI language models what this project is, what to index,
# and how to interact with it.

## Project

> KCP is an open protocol (Layer 8 — above HTTP/OSI Layer 7) for persistent
> governance, discovery, and lineage tracking of knowledge generated by AI agents.
> It gives every AI output a cryptographic identity, a traceable origin, and a
> durable address — so knowledge survives session boundaries.

- Protocol spec: SPEC.md
- Architecture: ARCHITECTURE.md
- Genesis block: GENESIS.json
- Manifest: KCP_MANIFEST.json
- RFC: RFC-001-CORE.md
- AI agent guide: AI_AGENT_GUIDE.md

## Key Concepts

- **Knowledge Artifact**: any AI-generated output (report, analysis, code, insight)
  signed with Ed25519 and addressed by SHA-256 content hash
- **Layer 8**: the protocol layer above HTTP that handles cognitive persistence
- **Lineage**: parent→child DAG — every artifact knows its origin
- **ACL**: per-artifact access control (public / org / team / private)
- **KCPNode**: embedded in-process node (no server required for local mode)
- **Genesis Block**: GENESIS.json — cryptographic anchor of the protocol

## SDKs (all implemented)

- Python 3.13: sdk/python/
- TypeScript (Node.js 25): sdk/typescript/
- Go 1.22: sdk/go/

## Documentation Index

- SPEC.md — Full protocol specification
- ARCHITECTURE.md — Three modes (Local / Hub / Federation), crypto, P2P
- AI_AGENT_GUIDE.md — Integration guide for AI agents (this file's companion)
- RFC-001-CORE.md — RFC summary (quick reference)
- rfcs/kcp-001-core.md — Full formal RFC (IETF-style, 614 lines)
- docs/testing.md — How to run tests for all SDKs
- docs/whitepaper.md — Academic paper
- docs/comparison.md — vs Semantic Web, MCP, Git, Knowledge Graphs
- docs/use-cases.md — 10 real-world use cases
- docs/roadmap.md — Development roadmap with current status
- CONTRIBUTING.md — Contribution guidelines

## Examples (canonical schema — aligned with SDK models)

- examples/payload.json — KnowledgeArtifact schema example
- examples/query.json — Search request example
- examples/response.json — SearchResponse schema example

## Optional (implementation reference)

- poc/kcp_core.py — End-to-end runnable demo (7 scenarios)
- sdk/python/kcp/ui/index.html — Single-file Web UI

## Do NOT index (build artifacts, lock files, test internals)

- sdk/python/tests/
- sdk/typescript/src/
- sdk/go/pkg/
- sdk/typescript/package-lock.json
- sdk/typescript/tsconfig.json
- sdk/typescript/jest.config.js

## Optional

- examples/ — Sample payloads (payload.json, query.json, response.json)
- sdk/python/kcp/ui/index.html — Single-file Web UI
